issues.message: Description is misleading: states the config includes 'React, a11y, Prettier, and import-order rule sets' but the base config (index.js) only includes base + typescript. The a11y, prettier, and import-order configs are separate optional imports (e.g. '@gravity-ui/eslint-config/prettier', '@gravity-ui/eslint-config/a11y', '@gravity-ui/eslint-config/import-order'). React is also a separate export ('./react'), not part of the base config.

README in data file is incomplete: vendor README documents three additional optional configs (prettier, a11y, import-order) with usage examples, but the data file's readme field only covers the base usage. These are important configs users need to know about.

Data file does not mention additional package exports: ./client, ./server, ./react, ./base, ./typescript are all available as separate imports per package.json exports but are not documented anywhere in the data file.
